title: Checkpoint RED evidence: seven-wrapper malformed-input table + Codex event-output fixtures
action: Build the executable fixture harness hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs: for EACH of the seven wrappers (bee-session-init, bee-prompt-context, bee-state-sync, bee-chain-nudge, bee-session-close, bee-model-guard, bee-write-guard), a process-level row set feeding empty stdin, junk bytes, null, JSON array, wrong/missing cwd, and huge payload; plus Codex event-output parse rows (PreCompact/SubagentStop/Stop advisory encoding, PreToolUse deny shape). Run it against the CURRENT unmodified wrappers and record every failure verbatim in reports/red-baseline.md. This cell fixes NOTHING (per D2 and learnings 20260711-model-tier-guard: adversarial rows from the start, checkpointed before repair).

truths: the harness executes all seven wrappers as real child processes, not imported functions
red-baseline.md records which wrapper crashed/misbehaved on which row, verbatim output
no production hook file is modified by this cell
the verify command exits non-zero when any harness row fails (no pipe swallowing exit codes)

artifacts.substantive: process-level fixture table: 7 wrappers x malformed-input rows + event-output parse rows
verbatim RED failures per wrapper/row before any fix

prohibitions: no edits to hooks/*.mjs production wrappers
no fix bundled into the checkpoint

trace.outcome: Built hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs: a process-level fixture harness spawning all seven production wrappers as real child processes with 7 universal malformed-input rows + event-wired Codex advisory/PreToolUse rows. Ran --baseline against the unmodified wrappers and recorded 16 RED findings verbatim in reports/red-baseline.md: 6/7 wrappers (all but bee-model-guard.mjs) crash with an uncaught TypeError on a top-level JSON null payload or a non-string object cwd instead of failing open; bee-write-guard.mjs silently allows an apply_patch write targeting the unconditionally direct-edit-denied .bee/state.json; bee-chain-nudge.mjs and bee-session-close.mjs emit plain-text prose for Codex PreCompact/SubagentStop/Stop advisories instead of a parseable JSON systemMessage (D2). No production hooks/*.mjs wrapper was edited; verified via git diff --stat showing zero changes to the seven wrappers.
